zh: 尊重孩子:這兒說的尊重並非隨其任性、
en: Respect your child — but respect does not mean indulging their every whim.
The balance is for parents to judge themselves.

zh: 孩子不願上才藝班或想嚐試新的事物、
en: If a child refuses an enrichment class or wants to try something new,
parents should not dismiss their wishes on their behalf.

zh: 可先了解孩子的想法、彼此溝通、
en: Understand their thoughts first, and communicate with them.

zh: 若是想體驗父母認爲有危險的事物、
en: If they want to try something you find risky,
explain it or accompany them through it.
A child's questions come in a thousand varieties,

zh: 並非短短幾個字便能說的清楚、
en: and can't be settled in just a few words.

zh: 還得靠父母自個兒的累積經驗及觸類旁通的能力囉!
en: Parents must rely on their own experience and insight to navigate them.
